scope: Develop a terminal-based notepad application using the textual library. The application should feature a TUI with a sidebar listing all notes, a main editor pane for syntax-free text editing, and support for creating, editing, saving, removing notes, as well as keyboard shortcuts for common actions.

tasks.title: Write Tests for Application Functionality
tasks.description: Create a test file `test_notepad_app.py` to write unit tests for the notepad application. Test each method in the `NoteManager` class and the corresponding UI updates in the application class. Ensure that all tests cover edge cases (e.g., creating a note with an empty title, deleting a non-existent note) and verify expected behavior.

task_summaries: ✗ task_6: Write Tests for Application Functionality (5 iter)
